title: allosorus involutus
intro: Allosorus involutus is a type of fern, specifically a species of the genus Allosorus, commonly found in North America. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Allosorus involutus include reducing swelling and pain, as well as preventing the growth of bacteria and fungi, making it a useful treatment for wounds and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Allosorus involutus can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
